description: Polish QuantAI app: integrate @quant/brand system into theme, add Framer Motion page transitions and staggered animations, enhance ChatInterface/page components with proper dark mode, loading skeletons, responsive layout, and motion tokens. Wire existing React Query hooks with the brand system theming.
steps: Update apps/quantai/src/app/globals.css to import and use @quant/brand CSS variables via generateBrandCSS() and generateAppCSS('quantai') and generateThemeCSS('dark'). Add dark mode toggle support with proper theme variables. Ensure responsive 360-1440px coverage is maintained.
Update apps/quantai/tailwind.config.ts to extend theme colors from brand CSS variables (primary, accent, surface, semantic colors). Add brand font families and motion-related utilities.

Update apps/quantai/src/app/layout.tsx: Add dark mode class toggle (default to dark), import brand fonts (Inter from next/font), add meta viewport for responsive, wrap children in a ThemeProvider that applies data-theme attribute.
Create apps/quantai/src/providers/theme-provider.tsx: A client component that manages dark/light theme state using localStorage preference and system preference, applies class 'dark' to html element.

Update apps/quantai/src/app/page.tsx: Add Framer Motion AnimatePresence and motion.div page transitions using spring.gentle from @quant/brand. Add staggered list entrance for conversation items in sidebar. Add loading skeleton UI while chat loads (pulsing placeholder blocks). Use brand colors for accent/primary styling.

Update apps/quantai/src/components/ChatInterface.tsx: Add framer-motion animations - messages slide in with spring.snappy, typing indicator uses motion.div with bouncy spring. Add hover/press/focus states with 44px minimum tap targets (already mostly done). Add dark mode color classes using brand CSS vars. Add empty state when no messages with friendly copy and illustration.
Create apps/quantai/src/components/LoadingSkeleton.tsx: Reusable skeleton component with shimmer animation using brand motion tokens. Variants: chat-message, sidebar-item, model-card.
Update apps/quantai/src/components/ModelSelector.tsx: Add framer-motion dropdown animation (spring.stiff for open/close), brand colors for selected state, hover states with scale microinteraction.
Update apps/quantai/src/app/voice/page.tsx: Add motion animations for voice activation state, use brand accent color for active voice indicator, add loading/error/empty states.
Ensure all components use semantic color tokens (var(--foreground), var(--surface), var(--primary), etc.) so dark/light mode works automatically.
acceptance_criteria: QuantAI app uses @quant/brand color tokens and motion springs throughout
Dark mode works correctly toggling via class strategy
Page transitions use Framer Motion with spring physics from brand
Chat messages animate in with stagger effect
Loading skeletons appear while data loads
Empty states display friendly copy when no conversations
All interactive elements have 44px minimum tap targets
TypeScript compiles without errors: pnpm --filter @quant/quantai typecheck
verification: Run pnpm --filter @quant/quantai typecheck and confirm it passes
findings: All changes compile cleanly with npx tsc --noEmit (exit 0). Pre-commit hooks (prettier) ran successfully and reformatted code. ThemeProvider uses localStorage key 'quantai-theme' and system preference. Brand CSS variables applied in globals.css for both light and dark modes. Framer Motion spring tokens from @quant/brand used throughout. LoadingSkeleton has chat-message, sidebar-item, and model-card variants.
